tweets.text:
🚨ANOTHER FAIRFAX FATALITY.
 
Just one month after Stephanie Minter was stabbed to death by a criminal illegal alien at a bus stop, Anibal Armando Chavarria Muy—a criminal illegal alien from Guatemala—has been arrested for second-degree murder.
 
On March 30, 2026, Fairfax County Police Department arrested Chavarria Muy in connection to a fatal stabbing of a man in Bailey’s Crossroads, Virginia. The male victim was pronounced dead at the scene.
 
DHS is calling on Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger and Virginia's sanctuary politicians to not release this murderer back into our communities.

CRIMINAL ILLEGAL HIT ICE AGENT WITH CAR, REMAINS AT LARGE. 

On March 25, 2026, ICE conducted a targeted vehicle stop to arrest Xa Lee, a fugitive and criminal illegal alien from Laos. When ICE officers attempted to conduct the vehicle stop, Lee fled the scene and hit an ICE officer with his vehicle.

Lee is a fugitive and is also wanted for previous convictions of vehicle theft, stolen property, conspiracy, petty theft, two DUIs, resisting an officer, battery, and felony possession of a firearm.

If you have any information on Lee’s whereabouts, please contact the ICE Tip Line at (866) 347-2423

tweets.text:
David Courvelle is NOT and was NEVER an ICE employee.

Courvelle was a contractor employed by a private company. ICE conducts robust investigations regarding allegations of misconduct that occur at any of its facilities.

ICE holds all contractors and personnel to the highest professional standards and takes all allegations of misconduct extremely seriously. Anyone who falsely reported that an ICE officer was accused or convicted of these horrific crimes MUST issue a correction.
